experiment: b=4 deep-region defect ceiling, tetraquadric 3+1 family
method: exact rank over F_p via flint.nmod_mat; vectorized sparse construction
verdict: Finite-field ranks at b=4 match the Thom-Porteous value 480 and disagree with the factorial value 960. The general-b identification is proved in Theorem 5.1 for the acyclic Toeplitz range.
status: computed finite-field distinction between candidate ceilings; general-b identification is proved in Theorem 5.1 for the acyclic Toeplitz range
